testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Admin Panel displays admin header
OpenSparrow – Admin Panel Save Config button is hidden on Overview and shown on config tabs

OpenSparrow – Admin Panel displays admin nav sidebar

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Admin Panel Users tab lists existing users
OpenSparrow – Admin Access Control unauthenticated user is redirected to login
testcase.classname: unauthenticated user is redirected to login

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Admin Access Control editor-role user cannot access admin panel
testcase.classname: editor-role user cannot access admin panel

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Admin Access Control admin logout redirects to login page
testcase.classname: admin logout redirects to login page

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Admin Panel Mobile loads admin panel on mobile
OpenSparrow – Admin Panel Mobile admin nav is accessible on mobile
testcase.classname: admin nav is accessible on mobile
